title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Lucknow

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Lucknow
jsonLd.description:
IIM Lucknow, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
